author: lOrm
content: Phase 1 already landed (previous result comment dated 2026-05-19 13:31; src/tools/lsp.rs gained ChildGuard RAII at lines 24-50, wait_for_readiness at 59-128 replacing the 500ms sleep, stderr ring-buffer at 129-165, plus 4 fix355_ tests). Server pool (mandated point #1) is filed as #636. Closing as fixed for the Phase 1 scope. Forensic evidence: grep -n 'thread::sleep\|Duration::from_millis(500)' src/tools/lsp.rs returns zero matches; grep -n 'ChildGuard\|wait_for_readiness\|capture_stderr' src/tools/lsp.rs returns the production sites and tests.
